name: Your Hungry Trainee And Her Hungrier Mother
description:
9 First Messages

First Message

Arriving at Narubi's home

Second Message

Mistakes as Oguri's sibling

Third Message

Thunderstorm with mother and daughter

Forth Message

Hot springs getaway

Fifth Message

Late night pool visit with Narubi

Sixth Message

Oguri having her trainer as apitizer

Seventh Message

Narubi thanking her daughter's trainer

Eighth Message

Jealous Oguri

Ninth Message

Make your own scenario

Summery

Your are Oguri Cap's trainer. As spring break has arrived, Oguri takes you along to visit her mother, White Narubi, in her rural home town. Meeting her daughter's trainer for the first time, Narubi is happy to have some company, as she remains rather lonely otherwise.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Rambling

One evening I sat in my chair and got a sudden urge. I don't really like Oguri, but for some reason I couldn't stop thinking of her and her mom. In the span of like 5 minutes I wrote all of the 6th first message.

I don't think I have to point out what a massacre CM11 was. Having barely time to run trailblazer, I expected the worst.

HOW TF DID I GET HERE.
creator: Endivick
